zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Wardlaw於1496年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素時，她的父親Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie60歲，母親Lady Margaret Lindsay61歲。她於大約1536年3月7日與Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1538年9月7日之後在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Wardlaw于1496年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie60岁，母亲Lady Margaret Lindsay61岁。她于大约1536年3月7日与Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1538年9月7日之后在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Wardlaw was born in 1496, in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie, was 60 and her mother, Lady Margaret Lindsay, was 61. She married Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland about 7 March 1536, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 7 September 1538, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Wardlaw est née en 1496, à Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Lindsay, avait 61 ans. Elle a épousé Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland environ 7 mars 1536, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 7 septembre 1538, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Wardlaw 1496 in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie 60 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Lindsay 61. Sie hat um 7. März 1536 in Schottland, United Kingdom Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 7. September 1538 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Wardlaw è nata il nel 1496 nel Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Lindsay, aveva 61 anni. Lei sposato Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland circa 7 marzo 1536, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 7 settembre 1538, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Wardlawが1496年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカプリントン カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrieは60歳，母Lady Margaret Lindsayは61歳であった。約1536年3月7日にイギリススコットランドでMakgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Couslandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1538年9月7日以後にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Wardlaw(이)가 1496년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 캡링턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Lindsay(은)는 61세였다. 그녀는 대략 1536년 3월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1538년 9월 7일 이후 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Wardlaw nasceu em 1496, em Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Lindsay, tinha 61 anos. Ela casou-se com Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland aproximadamente 7 de março de 1536, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 7 de setembro de 1538, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Wardlaw родилась в 1496 г. в местности капрингтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Lindsay, 61. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland около 7 марта 1536 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 7 сентябрь 1538 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Wardlaw nació en 1496, en Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Lindsay, tenía 61 años. Se casó con Makgill Vicount of Oxfuid Lord Makgill Of Cousland aproximadamente 7 de marzo de 1536, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 7 de septiembre de 1538, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.
